name: Golden Nut Loaf
recipeIngredient: Salt and celery salt to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the carrots until tender, then grind them.
2. Add the ground carrots, cooked rice, and crushed wheat crackers to a bowl with bread crumbs.
3. Soak the bread crumbs in water until soft, then squeeze out the excess liquid.
4. Measure 2 cups of soaked bread crumbs into a separate bowl.
5. Mix all ingredients together in a large bowl.
6. Grease an oiled loaf pan and pour the mixture into it.
7. Brush some oil on top of the loaf before baking.
8. Sprinkle with additional cracker crumbs.
9. Bake until done and serve with tomato sauce.
